task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and object key as parameters and returns the S3 URI in the format 's3://bucket-name/object-key'
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs, which follow the pattern 'i-' followed by exactly 17 hexadecimal characters (lowercase)
